title: The Rebellion Regroups After Udon
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Kawamatsu, Unknown person #13, Hiyori, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Gyukimaru as After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.
scene: After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that I would meet you here, in a place like this.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But the fact that you are alive and well

dialogue.speaker: Hiyori
dialogue.text: Fills me with happiness, Lady Hiyori!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: come to think of it, she did say

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that after her parents died, she was raised by a Kappa...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm so sorry... back then, I was so scared!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And you always gave me any food you found...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I couldn't bear to see you waste away, year after year...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Especially because you could easily subsist if you were on your own! I couldn't bear the thought of you dying to save me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I got so scared... I'm sorry for running!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So that's how it was. Well, as you can see, I've gotten quite fat in the years since!

dialogue.speaker: Gyukimaru
dialogue.text: WAHAHAHA! We're here for revenge, Gyukimaru!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These guns can take out a wild beast.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've stolen away so many of our weapons!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Oi! Wait! Why are you running again?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: How do they know each other?!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Rebellion Regroups storyline with 35 dialogue beats. After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.
